title: Record soft66/async55 compaction and 600-char tool previews

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft66 Async55 Preview600 Contract

## Soft 66
full compaction soft trigger defaults to 0.66 so long sessions reclaim earlier while hard block stays at 0.90

## Async 55
async background compaction and swarm micro pressure start at 0.55 so pre-rot reclaim begins sooner

## Preview 600
tool-result previews trim to 600 chars after the 20k budget for denser long-horizon context

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status vitest
